name: duarteos-core-ai
description: AIOS multi-agente para Claude Code. 14 agentes com personas + 67 mind clones + 11 conselhos + 26 squad commands + 24 MCPs + OMEGA (quality enforcement loop + circuit breaker) + Process Chief (toda task passa pelo Deming) + 28 Process Cards (processos formais reutilizaveis em 6 categorias) + MMOS v3 Pipeline (11 Fases + PCFE Pre-Clone Fidelity Estimation + Gate Humano + Scaffold Automatico) + Synapse v2 (memoria incremental) + Inbox/Caixa + Dossies Tematicos + YOLO Mode + Constitution + 4-Layer Config + Task Templates + Quality Gates + IDE Sync + Incremental Dev Rule + PM Pure Orchestrator.
author: Robson Duarte
